name: Sonata
description: Notation drifting off its staves — note heads lean on their stems between faint rules, recomposed by every redraw.

code.style: --note: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3)); --rule: ( border-top: calc(5px / @Y) solid rgba(60, 56, 48, 0.28); box-sizing: border-box; /* head and stem share one emitted ink and position so the note holds together */ --nk: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2)); --nx: @r(18, 50); --ny: @r(34, 62); @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--nx) * 1%); top: calc(@var(--ny) * 1%); width: 20%; height: 15%; border-radius: 50%; background: @var(--nk); transform: rotate(-18deg); transition: ease 600ms; } :after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: calc(@var(--nx) * 1% + 18%); top: calc(@var(--ny) * 1% - 34%); width: calc(20px / @Y); height: 40%; border-radius: 99px; background: @var(--nk); transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.16) { :before { background: var(--note); } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
